markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content feedback, process updates, and performance reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Process Streamlined:** The Airtable workflow was simplified to `Drafts → Second Draft Review → Published` to reflect Navan's internal process and reduce confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [**Content Feedback:** Future drafts must have smoother introductions and accurate "Key Takeaways" that align with the final, edited article.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Upgrade:** GrowthX is replacing Scrunch with a proprietary AI Visibility Tracking Platform, which offers a pre-built prompt index and will be demoed next week to key stakeholders Nima and Maran.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:** The team aims to publish 5 articles this week; the weekly sync will shift to bi-weekly once the project enters Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)

## Topics

### Content Feedback & Process Refinement

  - [**Problem:** Drafts had choppy introductions and "Key Takeaways" that became inaccurate after editing.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will focus on writing smoother intros and ensure takeaways are updated post-edit. Navan will provide examples of strong intros for reference.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**Problem:** The Airtable workflow was confusing and didn't match Navan's internal process.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [**Solution:** The workflow was simplified to:](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [`Drafts Ready for Review` (first pass)](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [`Second Draft Review` (final check before publish)](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [`Published`](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [**Legal Review:** Navan will manage legal review internally for competitive comparison articles (3 currently in process), which will have a longer publishing timeline. All other SEO articles can be published directly after the final review.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)

### Image Sourcing

  - [**Problem:** The process for sourcing cover images was unclear.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will add free stock photos to the Airtable `Cover Image` field for each draft, adhering to Navan's existing visual style. AI-generated imagery is not permitted.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Performance Reporting & AI Visibility

  - [**Looker Dashboard:** The dashboard is live, tracking performance for the first 4 published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
      - [**Initial Data:** New articles are ranking well (avg. position 4–6), but it's too early for definitive conclusions.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [**Refreshed Article:** The "10 Essential Steps..." article shows a 28-day traffic dip, likely due to the holiday season and a recent Google Core update.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Platform:** GrowthX is upgrading from Scrunch to a proprietary tool.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The new platform provides a pre-built index of \>100k prompts, eliminating the need to build them from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
      - [**New Prompts:** GrowthX created new prompts using target keywords to directly link content performance to AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [**Baseline:** The start of January will serve as the baseline for measuring future AI visibility growth.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
      - [Add cover images to all drafts in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [Implement feedback on intros and takeaways for new drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [Schedule the next meeting, prioritizing attendance for Nima and Maran.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [**Navan:**](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [Review articles in the `Drafts Ready for Review` view.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [Provide examples of strong blog introductions.](https://fathom.video/share/HE3iQg2rGWShyDJvxcgERgGbizhSXd2e?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
